description.ko: 유리를 통과하는 빛에 대한 미니멀리즘적 연구로, 선명한 무지개 스펙트럼과 복잡한 가성광(caustic) 패턴을 만들어냅니다.
description.en: A minimalist study of light passing through glass, creating a vivid rainbow spectrum and intricate caustic patterns.

prompt: A high-precision optical render of PRISM-2, titled 'The Refractive Core.' A complex, multifaceted geometric glass sculpture refracts a sharp beam of white light into a brilliant, fanned-out spectrum of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, and #8000FF deep violet. Soft #FFFF00 yellow caustic patterns dance across a dark matte background. Macro focus on internal light reflections and intense chromatic aberration at the edges of the glass. Minimalist aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the pure energy of light dispersion.
